transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang, I prepared
Home-cooked meals
It's very rare that I crave this kind of food
Well, I already ate something before this
so this will be a simple mukbang
I have more ground soybean stew, but this is all I can fit into the pot
I ordered 6 servings total
I mixed the steak tartare bibimbap and young radish bibimbap together (bibimbap=rice mixed with assorted veggies with sauce)
Bon appetit
I love their ground soybean stew, so I order them very often
I thought this was just in my neighborhood
But I found out that it's a chain
This tastes really good
That's amazing
It's from Bogeul Bogeul Jjigae Nara

Let's take the egg yolk out really quick
I can't mix this
I didn't want to mix it with gloves
I'm tired
First bite=big bite
There's a lot of meat
Mix a little bit of the stew
So good
Egg yolk
Mix it with bibimbap
There are a lot of people that don't eat this
But it's really good
I keep wanting to blow on it
I don't usually eat tofu either
It feels like crushed tofu
It doesn't sound too appetizing, but it's delicious

Order it from the right place and you'll be amazed
It's made out of soybean
Fried egg
What's funny about Korean food is that
You crave it so much one day and other days you don't
It's hard to scoop because of the vegetables
I can't really taste the steak tartare
What the soybean looks like?
Can you see it?
Just feels like crushed tofu
Something here is spicy
That's weird
I don't know what's spicy
Steak tartare
Put the stew in here
I'm avoiding the dried seaweed

There's not much food left
The bowl is pretty deep
There's still a lot left
That was too many vegetables
I think the soybean is spicy
It's never been spicy
I've had it at least 30 times
I think this is spicy
Yes, it's this
I'm going insane now
[Chat: What's inside the bibimbap?] Steak tartare, young radish, carrots, spinach
Bean sprouts
Fiddleheads
I couldn't think of the name of this
Everything's so salty
So salty

This is salty, this is salty, that's salty
Hot!
I finished it
I used the book as a trivet That's embarrassing
It's a novel book I enjoy reading
Written by Jeon Min Hee
Game novel
Spicy
Now I know why it's spicy
I usually order this from the delivery app which gives me the option to choose the spice level
And I always order it at level 1
But I ordered this over the phone
So this has to be Medium Spicy or Spicy
1 last bite
Although there's a little bit of the stew left
I don't have any more rice to go with it

It's salty and spicy
I have some stew left
But it's too salty to eat it individually
I'll eat it later with some rice
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
